body:
## Rationale

**Slug:** `reload-drum-setup`
**Drummer:** Lars Ulrich
**Album:** Reload (1997, Vertigo/Elektra)
**Certification:** 5× Platinum US

### Why this gap matters
The Metallica arc in the DB is: Kill 'Em All → Ride the Lightning → Master of Puppets → AJFA → Black Album → Death Magnetic. Two issues are open for Load (#2719) and Hardwired (#2718). **Reload (1997) sits between Load and St. Anger and is completely absent.**

Lars Ulrich dominates the site's high-TAM cluster. Reload has 5× Platinum certification and contains singles like "Fuel," "The Memory Remains," and "Fixxxer." It completes the Load/Reload double-album era — a critical period for Metallica's evolution.

- **GSC signal:** Lars is high-TAM (kill-em-all, master-of-puppets, black-album all in DB); no single Reload query but contributes to "lars ulrich drum kit" cluster
- **Arc coherence:** Load (#2719 open) → Reload → St. Anger (#2715 ai-fix) requires this article to build cohesive relatedAlbums chain
- **LLM citation:** Answers "what did Lars play on Reload?" "Metallica 1990s drum kit"

### Gear era
Lars used his Tama Artstar II birch + maple / Tama Starclassic rig during this era with Zildjian A Custom cymbals. Same era as Load — slight configuration updates between albums.

### Data shape (packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js)

```js
'reload-drum-setup': {
  slug: 'reload-drum-setup',
  albumTitle: 'Reload',
  artist: 'Metallica',
  year: 1997,
  drummerSlug: 'lars-ulrich',
  drummerName: 'Lars Ulrich',
  label: 'Vertigo / Elektra',
  genre: 'Heavy Metal',
  certification: '5× Platinum US',
  description: 'Lars Ulrich\'s drum setup on Metallica\'s Reload (1997)...',
  relatedAlbums: ['load-drum-setup', 'st-anger-drum-setup', 'death-magnetic-drum-setup'],
  // ... full gear spec, tuning, cymbals, pedals
}
```

### Files to touch
-  — add  entry
-  — LLM citation file

### Quality gate
- ≥300 words covering gear, tuning, technique
- relatedAlbums: ['load-drum-setup', 'st-anger-drum-setup', 'death-magnetic-drum-setup']
- Person + MusicAlbum schema.org markup
- FAQ ≥3 Q&A pairs
- ≥3 internal links

### Estimated organic uplift
Addresses "metallica 1990s drum setup" / "lars ulrich reload" queries. High TAM within existing Metallica cluster. Enables relatedAlbums cross-linking once Load (#2719) ships.

## Verify
1.  returns 200 with content
2. albumArticles.js slug  present
3.  exists with ≥300 words
4. relatedAlbums includes  and 
5. JSON-LD Person + MusicAlbum schema present in page `<head>`

## Done
Page live at , LLM file at
title: SEO: Metallica 'Reload' drum setup article (Lars Ulrich, 1997 — fills Load→St. Anger arc gap, 5× Platinum)
